old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.3","title":"Fix RFC 8613 nonce and option encoding","description":"Rust OSCORE nonce construction XORs Sender ID length with PIV length instead of encoding Sender ID length, no-PIV responses use responder identity instead of the request's complete nonce, empty response OSCORE options encode as 0x00 instead of empty, and parser accepts reserved bits/trailing bytes. Correct these RFC 8613 interoperability defects with independent published-vector or literal formula tests.","acceptance_criteria":"Nonce formula matches RFC 8613 Section 5.2 literals; no-PIV response reuses request nonce identity; empty option is zero bytes; reserved bits 5-7 and trailing bytes with k=0 reject; existing RFC vectors and roundtrips pass; no_std/release/all-feature tests, Clippy, and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:20:57.243022Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T23:20:57.243022Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:20:57.459214Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented and validated with RFC-literal tests; debug/release/all-feature/no-default suites and library Clippy pass; three hash-bound reviews found no remaining in-scope P0-P2 defects. Context lifecycle remains .48.2.
